author: y4rr
content:
Phase 8 complete. APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS.

Outcome: 11 PASS-able vision models -> 12. ConvNeXt-T migrated successfully. DeepLabV3 STOP-AND-REPORTed for structural divergence beyond naming.

PASS-able value-parity models after Phase 8:
1-11. (Phase 7's 11)
12. ConvNeXt-T ✓ (NEW — max_abs=1.669e-6, max_rel=3.226e-4)

Two movements:

Movement 1: ConvNeXt-T (#1005) — PASS
- src/ ferrotorch-vision/src/models/convnext.rs:
  - Added Parameter<T> field layer_scale_gamma per ConvNeXtBlock, shape [C, 1, 1], init 1e-6 (line 107, 154)
  - Forward: mul(&out, layer_scale_gamma.tensor()) before residual add (line 179-185)
  - Stem Conv2d, pwconv1, pwconv2, downsample.conv: bias=true (matching torchvision)
  - named_parameters/named_children expose new layer_scale_gamma
- test-side ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance_vision_models.rs:
  - remap_torchvision_to_ferrotorch_convnext_keys (~190 LoC) at line 3737
  - Renames features/classifier paths + RESHAPES Linear pwconv weights to Conv1×1 4-D
- Probe-before-fix: torchvision dump confirmed 18 layer_scale keys (3+3+9+3 blocks), all bound in remap
- Value-parity test PASSES with max_abs=1.669e-6 (3 orders of magnitude under tolerance)
- 4 #[ignore=#1005] markers removed from ConvNeXt tests; all PASS post-removal
- Existing ConvNeXt forward-shape tests preserved
- Surfaced and fixed inline: undocumented Downsample conv bias=true divergence (8th sub-divergence not in #1005 enumeration)

Movement 2: DeepLabV3-ResNet50 (#1006) — REPORTED, REDIRECT to #1009
- Probe-before-fix uncovered structural divergence beyond naming:
  - ASPP atrous_rates: ferrotorch hardcodes (6,12,18); torchvision default is (12,24,36)
  - DeepLabHead Sequential: torchvision is 5 elements [ASPP, Conv2d(256,256,3,bias=False), BN(256), ReLU, Conv2d(256,N,1,bias=True)]; ferrotorch is 2 elements (missing 3×3+BN intermediate, classifier bias=False)
  - ASPPPooling submodule indexing differs
- STOP-AND-REPORT triggered per pre-flight
- Filed #1009 for the deeper structural work (Aspp::new(atrous_rates), full 5-element DeepLabHead, ASPPPooling rename)
- DeepLabV3 value-parity test was never wired — no #[ignore] marker to remove
- Movement 2 cannot be 'pure naming remap'; src/ rework needed in a future phase

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- convnext_tiny_value_parity: ok
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- value_parity: 58 passed, 0 failed, 9 ignored
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision (full): 13 test bins green, 0 fails
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision -p ferrotorch-nn --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/ ferrotorch-gpu/ ferrotorch-nn/: empty
- 9 fmt-drift files (densenet, efficientnet, mobilenet, resnet, etc.) verified pure whitespace reflow from previous phases not having been fmt'd; subagent picked them up by running cargo fmt -p ferrotorch-vision

Coordination boundaries 100% respected. STOP-AND-REPORT discipline functioned correctly on Movement 2 — exactly the pattern the architect skill calls for.

Closing #1005, #1008. Leaving #1006 open (deferred to #1009).
